entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00103) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00103 TO EDFSA11D0012 IS TO INCORPORATE SERVICE LEVEL AGREEMENTS RELATED TO DEBT RELIEF DISCHARGES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00104) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00104 TO EDFSA11D0012 IS TO UPDATE THE PRICING SCHEDULE TO INCORPORATE ON-GOING COSTS FOR CR6385 AND CR6427.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00105) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCLUDE REVISED PRICING FOR THE FOLLOWING CR 6346. TO CORRECT AN ADMINISTRATIVE ERROR IN CLIN C033 - THE CR NAME IS CORRECTED FROM BORROWER DEFENSE TO FRESH START PLUS. TO INCLUDE PRICING FOR CR 6498.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00106) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CORRECT ADMINISTRATIVE ERRORS IN CLINS A061, A064, A066, C033, C034, E046, E047, E048 AND E049 IN SECTION B OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION (P00105).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00108) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION B OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION (P00106), TO INCLUDE ONGOING PRICING FOR CHANGE REQUEST (CR) 6477 - PSLF INTERFACE FOR ELECTRONIC PSLF FORM SUBMISSIONS PHASE I.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00109) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION B OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION (P00108), TO INCLUDE COMMON PRICING FOR CHANGE REQUEST (CR) 6568 - IDR OPT OUT - PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FROM 4/7/23 TO 7/30/23.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00111) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE FAR CLAUSE 52.222-55 MINIMUM WAGES FOR CONTRACTOR WORKERS UNDER EXECUTIVE ORDER 14026 (JAN 2022) INTO THE CONTRACT AND ALL ASSOCIATED TASK ORDERS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (P00112) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE FAR CLAUSE 52.204-27 PROHIBITION ON A BYTEDANCE COVERED APPLICATION INTO THE CONTRACT WHICH ALSO EFFECTS ALL ASSOCIATED TASK ORDERS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
